JavaScript tests for String prototype methods including constructor, `toString`, `valueOf`, `charAt`, `charCodeAt`, `concat`, and `indexOf`.

## Folders
- **[15.05.04.01](15.05.04.01/README.md)**: Tests for the String prototype's constructor in JavaScript.
- **[15.05.04.02](15.05.04.02/README.md)**: Tests for the `toString` method of the `String` object and a string in JavaScript.
- **[15.05.04.03](15.05.04.03/README.md)**: Tests for the `valueOf` method of the `String` object to ensure correct string value return.
- **[15.05.04.04](15.05.04.04/README.md)**: Tests for the `charAt` method of the `String` object in various scenarios.
- **[15.05.04.05](15.05.04.05/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for `String.prototype.charCodeAt`, including out-of-bounds index handling.
- **[15.05.04.06](15.05.04.06/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for the `String.prototype.concat` method, including behavior with no arguments and length property.
- **[15.05.04.07](15.05.04.07/README.md)**: Tests for the `String.prototype.indexOf` method to verify correct index return values.
